name: bun-sqlite-drizzle-test-pattern
description: Use bun:sqlite + drizzle-orm/bun-sqlite for in-memory unit tests of Drizzle-based server logic. Inject DB as AnyDB (BaseSQLiteDatabase<any,any,any>) parameter so the same logic works with D1 in production and bun:sqlite in tests. Mock cloudflare:workers and @/db/client in todos.test.ts — do NOT mock ./todos-logic (causes cross-file contamination in bun test).

content: RedwoodSDK vite.config.mts: guard cloudflare + redwood plugins with 'process.env.VITEST' check so bun test runs without the cloudflare plugin. Add test.environment='node' and path alias @/=src/ in the same config.

title: Split todos into todos-logic.ts + todos.ts
rationale: todos.ts uses 'use server' + cloudflare:workers which are untestable in Node.js. todos-logic.ts takes AnyDB as parameter, has no cloudflare deps, and is fully unit-testable. todos.ts is a thin wrapper that wires env.DB -> createDb -> todos-logic.

content: RedwoodSDK Document component pattern: import CSS with '?url' Vite suffix, reference client entry via 'rwsdk_asset:/src/client.tsx' script src, include vite/client triple-slash reference in src/vite-env.d.ts for type safety.

name: rwsdk-useOptimistic-navigate-pattern
description: In RedwoodSDK RSC client components, use useOptimistic for immediate UI feedback (toggle completed, hide deleted item), then call the server function, then await navigate('/') to re-render the server component with fresh data. Two separate useOptimistic calls (one for state, one for deleted boolean) keep types clean.
